paragraphs: Hey! I'm a 19-year-old Physics student from northern Germany with about 7 years of coding under my belt. I work as a developer at BEYONDIT GmbH, building things across the full stack.

Rust is my language of choice — I love its performance guarantees and the way it forces you to think clearly about memory and ownership. On the other side, I'm equally at home crafting polished frontends, so fullstack is where I naturally ended up.
When I'm not writing code I'm probably buried in physics problem sets or poking at some new Rust crate. Feel free to reach out!
